evidence.explanation: The combined Stage 1+2 rule set has 17 top-level rules, exceeding the N9 moderate-fail threshold of more than 15 rules.
evidence.quote: 17. **Straight downward fall when no side influence acts.**

parsed_verdict.reasoning: I count 17 distinct top-level rules, with Stage 2 largely reformulating the same 17-rule set from Stage 1 rather than adding separate new rules. Because the rule count is strictly greater than 15, the set fails N9 under the specified parsimony threshold. I stop at the first failed criterion per the judging procedure.
